about.name: Kaustubh Pathak
about.rolesLine: Data Scientist · Data Engineer · NLP Enthusiast
summaryParagraphs: Data Scientist with 3+ years of experience building data-driven solutions to improve efficiency, accuracy, and utility of internal data processing. Experienced in deep learning, predictive modeling, forecasting and data mining, with strong backend engineering skills in Python/Flask/Django and modern data stacks.

Active in open-source communities and comfortable across backend and frontend technologies including JavaScript, Socket.IO, AJAX and jQuery, with hands-on operations experience both in collaborative teams and as an individual contributor.
education: ABV-IIITM Gwalior (2017 - 2022) — M.Tech (Dual Degree) in Information Technology, GPA 7.7
ST. Mary College, Etawah (2016) — Intermediate in PCM with Computer, GPA 8.8/10
achievements: Published research in Springer NLP conference (2023): https://link.springer.com/chapter/10.1007/978-981-19-9225-4_37

responsibilities: Graphic Designer for Aurora cultural festival at ABV-IIITM Gwalior

timeline.title: Built AI-UI Project
timeline.description: Developed AI-UI to unify interactions across OpenAI-compatible APIs with a single interface.

timeline.title: SDE-2, Data Engineering @ Dell India
timeline.description: Scaling ETL, model-serving APIs, streaming systems, and observability pipelines across enterprise workloads.

timeline.title: Published Springer NLP Research
timeline.description: Published work on Fourier alternatives in Transformer architectures.

timeline.title: Built COVID-19 India Forecasting Project
timeline.description: Implemented epidemiological and time-series forecasting models with rich analytics visualizations.

timeline.title: Data Engineering Intern @ Rakuten India
timeline.description: Built data discovery and transfer workflows using NLP search, Airflow, and storage integrations.

timeline.title: Data Science Engineering Intern @ Lambdatest
timeline.description: Worked on forecasting, anomaly detection, and business analytics dashboards.

timeline.title: NLP Engineer Intern @ Dolhinchat
timeline.description: Delivered chatbot systems and integrations across web and social channels.

timeline.title: Computer Vision Intern @ Eminenture
timeline.description: Built OCR and contextual matching pipelines for document-heavy workflows.

timeline.title: Developer Intern @ Vaidik Technologies
timeline.description: Contributed to NLP interfaces and full-stack blog platform workflows.

timeline.title: Web Developer Intern @ Shaastra Automations
timeline.description: Built dynamic full-stack web pages and UI implementation modules.

timeline.title: M.Tech (Dual Degree), ABV-IIITM Gwalior
timeline.description: Completed Information Technology dual-degree program with GPA 7.7.

timeline.title: Passed 12th (Intermediate)
timeline.description: Completed Intermediate in PCM with Computer from ST. Mary College, Etawah.

highlights: Built and deployed PySpark/Scala ETL pipelines in medallion architecture (Delta/Iceberg) handling 100M+ rows/day.
Built FastAPI-based NBA endpoints to serve data science models (XGBoost/Scikit-learn) with user-friendly outputs.
Worked on AngularJS + Spring Boot admin portal for sales role and client management workflows.
Implemented Golang remediation platform for remote server login and script execution to speed up debugging.
Built custom pipelines with Argo Workflows (Kubernetes) and Apache Airflow (non-Kubernetes).
Implemented Telegraf input/output plugins (Redfish, SNMP Trap, Message Bus, HTTP) for 10M+ requests/day.
Developed TCP/UDP Kubernetes ingestion pipeline, benchmarked Telegraf scalability, and contributed to testing + CI/CD.
Automated streaming services with Docker, Kubernetes, Azure, Spark and Scala.
Maintained Spark jobs (Java/Scala) and ETL pipelines across EventHub, DBFS and Blob Storage.
Built a Wrangler tool for database/table discovery using both non-contextual and NLP contextual search.
Implemented components with HyperLogLog and Bloom Filters using Java and Python.
Created multi-threaded and multi-process SFTP to MinIO/HDFS transfer pipelines with Airflow.
Handled DataOps workflows for transfer, filtering and analysis over SFTP, MinIO, HDFS, MySQL and streaming data.
Developed forecasting models to predict localized server demand and reduce infrastructure cost.
Built ETL pipelines from MySQL and S3 for Sumologic, Grafana and Superset dashboards on millions of rows.
Automated anomaly detection pipelines and alerting workflows for operational logs.
Created custom analytics dashboards for sales and business teams using Flask, Plotly, Pandas and MySQL.
Built OCR pipelines to extract structured data from PDFs and reduce manual processing effort.
Scraped large datasets from multiple sources including news sites, ticketing portals and social platforms.
Applied Siamese and Transformer-based sentence embeddings for contextual matching in real-time systems.
Designed domain-specific chatbot assistants in a cross-functional NLP team.
Integrated chatbots with management dashboards, CRMs and social platforms.
Built middleware to reduce Rasa model size and lower hosting footprint.
Built chatbot integrations across Web, Facebook, WhatsApp and Slack channels; also delivered a YOLOv5 pothole localization prototype.
Built NLP interfaces for news discovery and article recommendation.
Contributed to Django + Firebase full-stack blog platform and deployment workflows.
Worked as a full-stack developer building dynamic multi-page websites.
Contributed to company website development and UI implementation.
